project.title: Skyfall Mage2
project.description: A personal non-commercial game prototype exploring browser-first action RPG systems and WebGPU material simulation experiments.

posts.title: Skyfall Mage2 Browser Battle Prototype
posts.text: A browser-first action RPG prototype with a square battle field, mobile-friendly viewport cropping, auto-casting skills, and WebGPU material effects running as a public GitHub Pages demo.
